$comment: Design token file for the Drag Item component
$description: A sortable row used in reorderable lists. Contains a drag handle icon (drag_indicator) and a Custom Slot content area. The handle can be positioned on any of the four sides (Left, Right, Top, Bottom). For Top/Bottom positions the handle is rotated -90deg and the layout direction becomes vertical. Has 5 states: Default (idle gray), Pressed (darker gray + soft shadow), Dragging (blue tint + thick border + elevated shadow), Disabled (no background/shadow), and Empty (transparent with a dashed border placeholder).

width.description: Standard content width inside a 393px mobile viewport with 16px padding each side

gap.description: 4px gap between the drag handle and the content slot

border-radius.description: 4px corner radius on the outer container

pressed.description: #eaecf0 — slightly darker background when the item is actively pressed

dragging.description: #f0f9ff — light blue tint applied while the item is being dragged

empty.description: No background in Empty state (dashed border only)

dragging.description: Thick solid ring shown while the item is being dragged

empty.description: Thin dashed border indicating an empty drop target
Dashed border in Empty state to signal an available slot

dragging.description: #528bff — primary blue ring in Dragging state

empty.description: #528bff — same primary blue for the dashed empty slot border

pressed.description: 0px 1px 3px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.10), 0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.06) — subtle lift on press

dragging.description: 0px 12px 16px -4px rgba(16,24,40,0.08), 0px 4px 6px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.03) — elevated floating shadow while dragging

size.description: 20px — width and height of the drag_indicator icon

icon-name.description: GHL icon name for the drag affordance (six-dot grid pattern)

left-right.description: Handle renders upright when positioned on the left or right side

top-bottom.description: Handle rotated -90deg when positioned on the top or bottom edge so the dots run horizontally

default.description: #98a2b3 — muted handle color in idle Default state

pressed.description: #475467 — darker handle when item is being pressed

dragging.description: #528bff — handle adopts the primary blue tint while being dragged, matching the border

empty.description: Handle is invisible (opacity 0) in Empty state — space is reserved but icon is hidden

padding-vertical.description: 8px top and bottom padding inside the Custom Slot content area

border-radius.description: 4px corner radius on the content slot container

typography.description: 13px Semibold, 18px line-height — placeholder label shown when the slot has no content

color.description: #98a2b3 — muted gray for the 'Custom Slot' placeholder text
